channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court Rules Against Unequal Dearness Allowance for Employees and Pensioners
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has ruled that there cannot be different rates of dearness allowance (DA) hikes for serving employees and pensioners, as inflation impacts both groups equally. The decision ...

item.title: Liberals emphasize party unity amid Gladu's controversial defection
item.description: At the Liberal Party’s national convention in Montreal, over 4,500 members gathered to discuss the party’s direction and values. The party maintains its identity as a 'big tent,' welcoming a wide spec...

item.title: Behind BINI’s Coachella Performance Outfits: Designers and Their Creative Vision
item.description: BINI's recent performance at Coachella was a major highlight of the music festival, and their striking outfits became a conversation starter. Designed by top Filipino talents, the group’s ensemble was...

item.title: Castlevania: Belmont's Curse Reveals Paris Setting and Combat in New Trailer
item.description: Konami's upcoming game, Castlevania: Belmont's Curse, showcased a new trailer during the Triple-i Initiative presentation, highlighting the game's combat mechanics, locations, and protagonist, a whip-...

item.title: Kenya must strengthen actions and accountability to end graft in public service
item.description: This Nation editorial calls on Kenyan authorities to raise their game in tackling corruption in the public sector, as graft remains one of the biggest threats to national development. It points out th...

item.title: Trump's Return to White House Correspondents' Dinner Raises Concerns
item.description: Donald Trump is set to attend the White House Correspondents' Association (WHCA) dinner later this month for the first time as president, an event meant to celebrate journalism and press freedom. This...

item.title: SAA Group CEO Prof. John Lamola Resigns, Matshela Seshibe Appointed Acting CEO
item.description: John Lamola, the CEO of South African Airways (SAA), has resigned, effective at the end of April 2026. Lamola, who first joined SAA in 2021 and became CEO in 2022, led the airline through a crucial pe...

item.title: Record North Sea Oil Prices Renew Calls for UK to Reconsider Drilling Ban
item.description: North Sea oil prices have soared to an unprecedented high, fuelling debate over the British Government’s energy policy. The surge, primarily driven by geopolitical tensions involving Iran, has raised ...

item.title: Exploring South Asian Poetry: An Excerpt from 'Earth and Embers'
item.description: The article presents an excerpt from 'Earth and Embers: South Asia in Verse', a curated anthology featuring the work of poets such as Daya Dissanayake, Gautam Vegda, Indran Amirthanayagam, Kamalakar B...

item.title: Man Arrested After Attempted Firebomb Attack Near Sam Altman’s Home and Threats at OpenAI Headquarters
item.description: San Francisco police have arrested a suspect accused of throwing a Molotov cocktail toward the home of Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI. The incident occurred around 3:45 a.m. Pacific Time when an unidentifi...

item.title: Former Lagos IT staff arrested after stealing ₦15m equipment from previous employer as revenge for dismissal
item.description: One 28-year-old man wey dem call Ikpe don enter wahala after him break into the office of him former company, Vovida Communications Limited, for Lagos, come thief equipment wey worth about ₦15 million...

item.title: RCMP Investigating Two Break-and-Enter Incidents in Airdrie and Cochrane
item.description: The RCMP in Airdrie and Cochrane are asking the public for help in identifying two suspects involved in separate break-and-enter incidents at local businesses. The incidents took place in the early mo...

item.title: Iran lays out conditions for peace talks as negotiators arrive in Pakistan
item.description: Iran’s delegation has arrived in Pakistan to engage in peace talks with the United States, with both sides aiming to resolve tensions in the Middle East. Iran has made its peace demands clear, includi...

item.title: SEC Proposes Term Limits for Philippine Stock Exchange Broker Directors to Strengthen Governance
item.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) of the Philippines has proposed imposing term limits on broker directors of the Philippine Stock Exchange (PSE) to prevent entrenched control and enhance g...

item.title: Nafiu Bala Sets Age Limit and Insists on Due Process for ADC Leadership
item.description: Nafi’u Bala, wey dey claim leadership of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), don talk say the party leadership no go fit just dey assumed anyhow. E talk say dem must follow proper constitutional pr...

item.title: AI Chatbot Assists UK Woman in Diagnosing Rare Neurological Disorder After Years of Misdiagnoses
item.description: A 23-year-old lady in Cardiff, UK, Phoebe Tesoriere, has credited ChatGPT with helping her discover a rare neurological disorder after multiple misdiagnoses over the years. Phoebe had struggled with p...

item.title: Deputy minister says diversity goals motivated hiring decision later found to breach ethics rules
item.description: Christiane Fox, now the deputy minister of national defence, responded to a conflict-of-interest finding by saying she was trying to advance diversity and inclusion when she helped an acquaintance get...

item.title: Former Lawmaker Aliyu Gebi Under DSS Investigation Over Alleged False Intelligence Reports To Foreign Missions
item.description: The Department of State Services (DSS) recently arrest former member of House of Representatives, Aliyu Gebi, for allegedly spreading false intelligence reports give foreign embassies wey cause wahala...

item.title: INEC Shifts Voter Verification Exercise To After 2027 General Polls
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) don announce say di nationwide voter revalidation exercise wey suppose start for April 13 go now happen after di 2027 general elections. Di Commiss...

item.title: Eswatini court affirms legal access for US-deported migrants
item.description: Eswatini’s top court has upheld a decision allowing a local human rights lawyer to meet with detainees who were deported from the United States under a controversial third-country deportation programm...
